title: Escape From the Chateau
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Nami as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh? Nami, didn't Lola's vivre card get taken from you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, but only one half of it. I cut it into two pieces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since he's the master of the seducing woods,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We can cut right through the forest!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The straw hats are confirmed to be up ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Look behind us!! It's an enemy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our targets are just up ahead!! Take them dooo- down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry up, King Baun!! If they catch up to us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'll rip your stuffed eyes out!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 27 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
